name: iepirkumu-risku-platforma

scripts.deploy: npm run web:build && rm -f packages/web/dist/data/lots.json packages/web/dist/data/engine_output.json && npx wrangler pages deploy packages/web/dist --project-name iepirkumu-risku-platforma --commit-dirty=true
